title: ScrollFly
description: A very simple Minecraft mod that brings the flight speed adjustment from Spectator mode.
body:
# ScrollFly A very simple Minecraft mod that brings the flight speed adjustment from Spectator mode. --- ## Features In vanilla Minecraft, you can only adjust your flying speed using the mouse scroll wheel when you are in Spectator mode. This mod simply ports that exact functionality over to Creative mode! - **Scroll to Change Speed:** While flying in Creative mode, just use your mouse scroll wheel to speed up or slow down, exactly like you do in Spectator. - **Toggle Key:** Need to scroll through your hotbar while flying? You can toggle the mod on and off using a keybind (Default: `Z`). --- ## Installation ### Supported Versions - **Minecraft**: 1.20.1 - **Loaders**: Both **Fabric** and **Forge** are supported! ### Steps 1. Install your preferred mod loader ([Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/use/) or [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/)). 2. For Fabric, ensure you have the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) installed. 3. Download the latest release of ScrollFly for your respective loader. 4. Place the `.jar` file in your `mods` folder. 5. Launch the game! --- ## Compatibility - **Multiplayer:** This mod can NOT be used on the client if the server doesn't have it installed. The server must have the mod installed to use it. - **Loaders:** Works identically on both Fabric and Forge. --- ## License This project is licensed under the MIT License. Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks without asking for permission!
**Made with ❤️ by MrErenK** for the Minecraft community *For questions, suggestions, or support, feel free to open an issue on GitHub!*
